notes: Re-validated against the helper aligned to the official Oracle AIDP sample (oracle-samples/oracle-aidp-samples → StreamingFromOCIStreamingService.ipynb). 3 messages consumed in 20 sec via SASL/PLAIN with optional max_partition_fetch_bytes (1 MiB) + max_offsets_per_trigger (5) tuning options. /Volumes/<cat>/<sch>/<vol>/... checkpoint enforced via validate_checkpoint_path().
